faqs.question: What are your standard shipping options?
faqs.answer: We offer Ground (5-7 business days), Express (2-3 business days), and Overnight delivery. Ground starts at $9.99.

faqs.question: Do you offer international shipping?
faqs.answer: Yes! We ship to over 180 countries. Use tracking format FFINT followed by 12 digits for international.

faqs.question: What is the maximum package weight?
faqs.answer: We accept packages up to 150 lbs. Freight services available for heavier items.

faqs.question: How do I track my shipment?
faqs.answer: Enter your tracking number (FF1234567890 for domestic, FFINT123456789012 for international) on our website.

faqs.question: Why isn't my tracking number working?
faqs.answer: Tracking numbers may take up to 24 hours to become active. Verify the format and contact support if issues persist.

faqs.question: Can I get delivery notifications?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer email, SMS, and push notifications for all shipment status updates.

faqs.question: How do I initiate a return?
faqs.answer: Log into your account, go to Order History, select the item, and click 'Start Return'.

faqs.question: What is your return policy?
faqs.answer: Items can be returned within 30 days of delivery in original condition.

faqs.question: Who pays for return shipping?
faqs.answer: If return is due to our error, we cover shipping. Otherwise, a $7.99 fee applies.

faqs.question: How do I file a claim for a lost package?
faqs.answer: Contact us within 30 days with your tracking number. Claims resolved in 7-10 business days.

faqs.question: My package arrived damaged. What should I do?
faqs.answer: Take photos of damage immediately. File a damage claim within 48 hours.

faqs.question: What compensation do you offer for lost packages?
faqs.answer: Standard coverage is $100. Higher value items can be insured up to $5,000.

faqs.question: What documents are needed for international shipping?
faqs.answer: Commercial invoice, packing list, and any required permits. Our system guides you through customs.

faqs.question: Who pays customs duties and taxes?
faqs.answer: Recipient's responsibility unless you select DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) option.

faqs.question: How long does international shipping take?
faqs.answer: Express: 3-5 days. Standard: 7-14 days. Economy: 14-28 days.

faqs.question: How do I create a FastFreight account?
faqs.answer: Click 'Sign Up' and enter your email, create a password, and provide contact info.

faqs.question: What is FastFreight Premium?
faqs.answer: Free return shipping, priority support, 20% discounts. $9.99/month or $99/year.

faqs.question: How do I update my shipping address?
faqs.answer: Go to Settings > Addresses in your account. Save multiple addresses for quick checkout.

faqs.question: How is shipping cost calculated?
faqs.answer: Based on weight, dimensions, origin, destination, and service level.

faqs.question: Do you offer volume discounts?
faqs.answer: Yes! Business accounts shipping 50+ packages monthly qualify for discounts.

faqs.question: How do I schedule a pickup?
faqs.answer: Schedule through your account up to 2 weeks in advance. Same-day by 10 AM.

faqs.question: Is there a fee for package pickup?
faqs.answer: Free for Premium members. $3.99 for regular accounts. Saturday +$5.99.

faqs.question: Do you provide packaging materials?
faqs.answer: Free standard boxes and envelopes for FastFreight shipments.

faqs.question: What are your packaging requirements?
faqs.answer: Sturdy boxes, sealed seams. Max 150 lbs, max 108 inches combined length and girth.

faqs.question: How do I contact customer support?
faqs.answer: Phone: 1-800-FAST-FREIGHT (6 AM - 10 PM CST). Chat and email available 24/7.

faqs.question: What are your support hours?
faqs.answer: Phone: 6 AM - 10 PM CST. Chat and email: 24/7.
